name: The Skip Dating
overview: In these busy modern days, there is not enough time to find a romantic partner. For them, MC Yoo Jae-seok, Jeon So-min, and Nucksal arrange a quick and cool 4:4 blind date. Participants press either heart or skip button as they feel. It’s a quick and pleasant love business.

trailers.title: [Trailer] ⏭  The Skip Dating 💞 | Coming to Viu for FREE Tomorrow! (Subtitled)
